creative_brief: Close-up of cracked egg showing vivid orange yolk against white shell, natural lighting on rustic wooden surface.
primary_text:
Crack one of these eggs and the yolk is almost orange. Thick, vivid, the kind of colour that stops you mid-pour.

That colour comes from pasture. Farmer Brown's hens roam regenerative land in NSW. No cages. No sheds. No hormones.

These eggs reach our Brookvale hub in days, not weeks. You taste the difference the moment they hit the pan. Richer. Denser. Worth waking up for.

No middlemen. No commitment. Sydney families collect from Brookvale, Monday to Friday.
headline: You can tell by the colour of the yolk
description: Pasture-raised NSW eggs, days old. Zero middlemen. Collect from Brookvale hub.
